summary: Gruber announces the release of SmartyPants 1.1, a Movable Type plugin for typographically correct punctuation. The update improves dash handling, fixes curly quote bugs, and adds new formatting options. He also teases upcoming integration with Movable Type 2.6's new Text Formatting system, closing with an Indiana Jones reference about 'top men' working on it.
key_points: SmartyPants 1.1 adds flexible en-dash and em-dash shortcuts and fixes the previous overly restrictive space-dependent dash behavior
Bug fixes include corrected curly quote behavior and expanded tag exclusion list for code-like elements
Movable Type 2.6 will introduce a plugin-friendly Text Formatting system that SmartyPants will integrate with
money_quotes: Previously, it would look for " — " (space dash dash space), which was dumb, since many people do not use spaces around their em dashes.
We have top men working on integrating SmartyPants with MT 2.6's Text Formatting system. Who? Top men.
Spread the word, and smarten your quotes.
key_insight: Typographic details like proper curly quotes and em dashes matter, and tools should make correct typography the default rather than requiring fussy workarounds.
